comment: Logs a granular, constraint-by-constraint audit evaluation of the individual listing 'list_sf_003', storing its approval status, compatibility score, and detailed structured reasoning (budget, laundry, fitness, commute, and search query).

reasoning.budget: The listing price of $2900 is well within your maximum budget of $3500, providing excellent financial compatibility.
reasoning.laundry: The listing explicitly states 'In-unit Washer/Dryer' as an amenity, fully satisfying your requirement for in-unit laundry.
reasoning.climbing_gym: With a climbing gym located just 1.1 miles away, this listing comfortably meets your requirement for proximity to active fitness facilities.
reasoning.commute: The commute time to Downtown is only 12 minutes, which is significantly below your 30-minute maximum, ensuring a very convenient daily trip.
reasoning.overall: This SOMA Brick & Timber Loft is an excellent match for your criteria. It is well within your budget, provides the essential in-unit laundry, offers superb access to a climbing gym, and ensures a very short commute to Downtown. All your key constraints are met or exceeded with this listing.
